mapper.select: SELECT wf_process.*, t_eav_entity.`name` as formName,t_category.`name` as categoryName FROM wf_process LEFT JOIN t_eav_entity ON t_eav_entity.id = wf_process.form_type left join t_category on t_category.id = wf_process.category_id WHERE wf_process.id = #{id}

select t_eav_entity.id from wf_process left join wf_process_step on wf_process_step.process_id = wf_process.id and wf_process_step.type = 'start' left join t_virtual_form on t_virtual_form.`code` = wf_process_step.virtual_form_code left join t_eav_entity on t_eav_entity.id = t_virtual_form.entity_id where wf_process.id = #{processId} LIMIT 0,1

select t_virtual_form.* from wf_process left join wf_process_step on wf_process_step.process_id = wf_process.id and wf_process_step.type = 'start' left join t_virtual_form on t_virtual_form.`code` = wf_process_step.virtual_form_code where wf_process.id = #{processId} LIMIT 0,1
